creator: danmcgrath.ca@gmail.com
text:
Hey, just curious if the 2.2.0_7 update was overlooked from the 2017Q2 tree and
to give a gentle poke in case it was forgotten about ;)

#> pkg audit
OpenEXR-2.2.0_7 is vulnerable:
OpenEXR -- multiple remote code execution and denial of service vulnerabilities
CVE: CVE-2017-9116
CVE: CVE-2017-9115
CVE: CVE-2017-9114
CVE: CVE-2017-9113
CVE: CVE-2017-9112
CVE: CVE-2017-9111
CVE: CVE-2017-9110
WWW: https://vuxml.FreeBSD.org/freebsd/803879e9-4195-11e7-9b08-080027ef73ec.html

1 problem(s) in the installed packages found.
